scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -k -n web,backend,demo,worker -c blue,cyan,magenta,green "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm --filter @flowproof/demo-suite dev" "pnpm dev:worker"
scripts.start: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -k -n web,backend,demo,worker -c blue,cyan,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @flowproof/web start" "pnpm --filter @flowproof/backend start" "pnpm --filter @flowproof/demo-suite start" "pnpm --filter @flowproof/worker start"
scripts.setup: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm prisma migrate dev && pnpm seed
scripts.demo: pnpm seed && pnpm build && pnpm start
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm build && pnpm evaluate && pnpm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.lint: eslint apps packages prisma scripts tests playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts
